text.title: Facebook Ads Playbook Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules grounding the facebook-ads methodology. Each rule pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale.

rule.statement: New FB ad accounts MUST start at 25-50% of target budget for 7-14 days, ramping +25% every 3 days when delivery is stable.
rule.rationale: Hard launches at full budget flag the account and stall learning; gradual warmup keeps delivery healthy.

rule.statement: Placement mix MUST include FB feed + Reels + Marketplace; Audience Network is excluded unless explicit data justifies inclusion.
rule.rationale: Audience Network historically over-delivers low-quality impressions on FB campaigns.

rule.statement: Each ad set MUST forecast ≥50 conversions/week within 14 days, else exits learning phase forever.
rule.rationale: Meta documents 50/week as the floor; below that the model never stabilizes.

rule.statement: Verified domain + Aggregated Event Measurement (AEM) MUST be configured before launch (iOS 14.5+ deliverability).
rule.rationale: Without verified domain + AEM, iOS conversions undercount 30-50%.

rule.statement: Facebook Page MUST have a Quality Score ≥ Standard before paid launch; complaint history blocks delivery.
rule.rationale: Page-level penalties cascade to every campaign run from the page.
